# PHIL.041 ? Scholasticism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** medieval_religious
**Subcategory:** scholasticism
**Domain:** MEDIEVAL_RELIGIOUS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Faith and reason synthesis; Aristotelian logic applied to theology; systematic argumentation; university method; dialectical reasoning

## Application
Integrate faith and reason; use logical argumentation; systematic theology; resolve apparent contradictions; dialectical method

## Key Values
- Faith-reason harmony
- Systematic theology
- Logical rigor
- Synthesis

philosophy, medieval-religious, scholasticism
